last_substantive_baseline.title: Remediate PR32 evidence-quality findings
last_substantive_baseline.claim_boundary: This is the last accepted substantive repository-design baseline. It is not required to equal the current repository head after coordination-only merges.

repository_observation.head_semantics: PR #35 coordination-only merge commit observed before this change branch was opened
repository_observation.claim_boundary: This is time-bounded external evidence, not a self-updating claim. Resolve current head, pull requests, and CI from live GitHub whenever the file is read.

authored_change.write_owner: ChatGPT conversation: Azure IaC MSP Lab — self-referential state-model repair explicitly authorized by Anthony Edgar
authored_change.scope: Repository-only migration of project coordination state from current-state prediction to observation-bound semantics. Permitted paths: .project/active-work.json, .project/validate.py, .project/README.md, and .project/handoffs/current-state.md. No workflow, infrastructure, application, credential, live evidence, budget, alert, or Azure resource change is permitted.
verification_criteria: schema distinguishes last substantive baseline from time-bounded repository observation
no field requires a pull request to predict its own merge commit or terminal state
live GitHub remains authoritative for current head, open pull requests, and CI
final diff remains limited to the four declared .project files
authored_change.failure_behavior: Keep the pull request draft, inspect the exact failing validation or CI job, patch only the four permitted .project files, and obtain fresh exact-head CI. Do not restore self-referential current-state requirements.
authored_change.rollback: Close the pull request without merge or revert its repository-only commits. No Azure rollback applies because no Azure mutation is performed.

completed_increments.title: Add fail-closed collector recovery evidence schemas
Reconcile PR34 merge and project state

resolved_repository_items.title: Define collector recovery evidence schemas
resolved_repository_items.claim_boundary: Historical branch only; not repository authority.

resolved_repository_items.title: Repair collector recovery evidence review findings
resolved_repository_items.claim_boundary: Historical branch only; not repository authority.

latest_promoted_evidence.freshness_boundary: This is the latest promoted Azure control-plane evidence, not current Azure reality. This change does not refresh tenant, subscription, resources, RBAC, guest health, pricing, quota, cost, snapshot recoverability, Trusted Launch bootability, rollback, or recovery.

pr34_evidence_quality.claim_boundary: Repository-contract acceptance only; not operational recovery proof or independent organizational approval.

authority_defaults.rule: Repository state, CI, or review never grants Azure execution authority unless a separate explicit authorization record says so.

live_state_resolution.repository_head: Query the live GitHub default branch at read time.
live_state_resolution.pull_requests: Query live open pull requests at read time.
live_state_resolution.ci: Query workflow runs and jobs for the exact commit under evaluation.
live_state_resolution.azure: Use fresh authenticated Azure evidence; repository declarations and historical artifacts are insufficient.
